docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ARBITRATION HEARING SET FOR 9/29/97
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING

REQUEST FOR TRIAL DE NOVO FILED AFTER ARBITRATION, BY JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 25
CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN DEPT. 7 (611) NO SETTLEMENT REACHED

JUDGE DAVID BALLATI; RPTR SUSAN LEE; CLK C CARSWELL CASE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT W CNSL CAROLYN REINHOLDT. DEFT PRESENT BY MONICA WILEY. IN LIMINE MOTIONS ARE FILED, ARGUED, RULED ON. PROPOSED JURY VOIR DIRE AND IN- STRUCTIONS ARE FILED. ROLL TAKEN OF PROSP JURORS & QUALIF OATH IS ADMINSTRD. SEVERAL REQUESTS FOR HARDSHIP EXCUSES ARE GRANTED. CT AND EACH SIDE VOIR DIRES PROSP JURORS. BOTH SIDES PASS FOR CAUSE. PEREMPT CHALL ARE EXERCISED. 12 JURORS AND 1 ALT JUROR ARE SWORN. CONT TO 9:15 4/15/98.

JUDGE DAVID BALLATI; RPTR SUSAN LEE; CLK C CARSWELL CASE CALLED FOR CONT'G JURY TRIAL. ALL 12 JURORS PLUS 1 ALT JUROR PRESENT. PLTF & BOTH CNSL PRESENT. DEFT CASE RESUMES W ORAL & DOCMT EVID. CT READS INSTRUCTIONS TO JURY. EACH SIDE MAKES CLOSING ARGUMNT.JURY DELIBERATES AND REACHES A VERDICT FOR DEFT. DEFT TO PREPARE JMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $2,016.47 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,016.47, JURY REACHED VERDICT FOR DEFENDANT.
